_comment: Cross-document comparison question. The user wants the LLM to
organize the answer to highlight agreements and disagreements
between at least two sources. Toggle Compare on (in the chat UI
or pass compare_mode=True to the API) so the prompt context is
augmented with '(from: Doc Title)' markers and the COMPARISON MODE
expected_keywords: hand-pick 1-2 phrases that prove the LLM did
an actual cross-doc comparison (e.g. 'Doc A says ...', 'in
query: Compare and contrast 硅基流动 with 阿里云百炼.
